item.title: fangwei123456/spikingjelly
item.description: SpikingJelly is an open-source deep learning framework for Spiking Neural Network (SNN) based on PyTorch.

item.description: Simulation of spiking neural networks (SNNs) using PyTorch.

item.title: norse/norse
item.description: Deep learning with spiking neural networks (SNNs) in PyTorch.

item.title: nightscout/Trio
item.description: Trio - an automated insulin delivery system for iOS based on the OpenAPS algorithm with adaptations.

item.description: The Hyperscanning Python Pipeline

item.title: tinker495/JAxtar
item.description: JAxtar is a project with a JAX-native implementation of parallelizeable A* & Q* solver for neural heuristic search research.

item.title: ac-freeman/adder-codec-rs
item.description: A unified framework for event-based video. Encoder/transcoder/decoder for ADΔER (Address, Decimation, Δt Event Representation) video streams.

item.title: spdlearn/spd_learn
item.description: SPDlearn: A Geometric Deep Learning Python Library for Neural Decoding Through Trivialization

item.title: Criticality-Cognitive-Computation-Lab/btorch
item.description: Brain-inspired differentiable PyTorch toolkit for neuromorphic and computational neuroscience research

item.title: chaobrain/braintrace
item.description: Eligibility trace-based online learning for brain dynamics

item.title: sepahead/NCP
item.description: NCP (Neuro-Cybernetic Protocol): a versioned, typed, cross-language wire contract for a running NEST neural simulation (spiking, binary, rate) to perceive and act through robots, UAVs, and analysis clients over Zenoh — safety-gated action p

item.title: anindex/polystep
item.description: Training non-differentiable networks via optimal transport.

item.description: Dimensionality Reduction for Integrated Activity Data Analysis

item.description: Heterogeneous Edge Realtime Measurement and Execution System: A Unified Open-Source Framework for Realtime Multimodal Physiological Sensing, Edge AI, and Intervention in Closed-Loop Smart Healthcare Applications

item.title: chrplr/goxpyriment
item.description: An (AI friendly) psychology experiment framework

item.title: anzalks/synaptipy
item.description: A software for electrophysiology data visualisation and analysis. Multi file format support and plugin based analysis modules for user needs.

item.title: anulum/sc-neurocore
item.description: Universal Stochastic Computing Framework for Neuromorphic Hardware — Rust SIMD engine, Python simulation, Verilog RTL, HDC/VSA, SCPN integration

item.description: GUI/CLI to control experiments w/ multichannel audio, neural and video recordings, conduct data processing, analyses and make visualizations.

item.title: patr1ckzhu/ECTNet
item.description: End-to-end motor imagery BCI: custom ADS1299+STM32 acquisition board → PsychoPy+LSL recording → PyTorch training (transfer learning from BCI IV-2b) → real-time CPU inference (~40ms)
